overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a stealth-action game showing exploration of a grand, dilapidated institutional building with marble architecture. The player moves through entrance halls, ascends multiple staircases, and traverses corridors with ornate lighting fixtures and statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with reception desk

events.description: passing through wrought iron gates into the main building interior

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the entrance gates toward the main staircase

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the reception desk, facing away from camera

entered.detail: ornate black metal gates with circular designs, partially open
polished stone floor with geometric patterns
wide marble staircase with red carpet runner leading to upper floor
dark wood counter with papers and lamp, situated against left wall
tall shelves filled with books and boxes flanking the entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a first-person view entering a grand historic building through ornate iron gates. The camera moves forward across marble floors toward a wide staircase, passing a wooden reception desk where a guard stands. The space features high ceilings with arches and warm artificial lighting mixed with daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: main staircase ascending to upper floor

events.description: beginning ascent of the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the central marble staircase with red carpet runner

entered.detail: crimson carpet running up the center of the stairs
polished stone railings with decorative moldings lining both sides

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the grand marble staircase, moving from the entrance hall to the upper floor. The red carpet guides the path upward between ornate balustrades, with wall sconces providing warm illumination. The reception area and entrance gates fall behind as the climb continues.

events.description: reaching top of stairs and turning right into side corridor
passing through doorway into area with natural light from windows

agents.ego_description: turning right at the landing and proceeding through a doorway into a side corridor

entered.detail: tall dark wood doors with brass handles at the top of the stairs
tall windows with multiple panes allowing daylight to stream in
wooden board with papers pinned to it mounted on the wall
large planter with greenery sitting on the floor near the window

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, the camera turns right through wooden double doors into a corridor illuminated by natural light from large arched windows. The space features a bulletin board and potted plant against the wall, with the marble floor continuing from the staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: side reception area with cage elevator

events.description: approaching the cage elevator and secondary stairwell area

agents.ego_description: moving through the side reception area toward the elevator and stairs

entered.detail: wooden counter with shelves and boxes, similar to ground floor desk
black metal cage elevator with ornate ironwork, currently at ground level
tall storage cabinets with multiple compartments against the left wall
cork board with various notices and papers pinned to it

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a secondary reception area featuring another wooden desk and storage cabinets. Natural light streams through windows as the view approaches a distinctive black cage elevator. The space shows signs of wear with aged marble floors and institutional furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service stairwell with elevator shaft

events.description: beginning ascent of secondary staircase next to elevator shaft

agents.ego_description: climbing the narrow staircase alongside the cage elevator shaft

entered.detail: narrower marble stairs with wooden handrails, more utilitarian than main stairs
black metal cage structure of the elevator running alongside the stairs
long vertical red fabric banner with gold emblem hanging on the wall
sconce lights mounted on the wall providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a narrower service staircase with the cage elevator shaft visible to the left through the iron bars. The walls are plain with a prominent red banner, and the lighting is purely artificial. The reception area falls behind as the climb continues upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hallway with statues and chandeliers

events.description: entering the impressive hallway with wolf statues from the stairwell
guard crosses the hallway from right to left in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking down the grand hallway toward the large door, observing the statues

notable_agents.action: guard walking across the hallway from right to left, passing between the statues

entered.detail: ornate marble floor with intricate geometric inlay patterns
large bronze wolf statues on black pedestals flanking the hallway
elaborate black metal chandeliers hanging from the high ceiling
massive dark wood doors with metal studs at the end of the hall
balconies with iron railings on upper levels overlooking the hallway
white sign with black text reading PRIVATE mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the stairwell into an impressive grand hallway lined with large bronze wolf statues on pedestals and elaborate chandeliers hanging overhead. The space features ornate marble floors and mezzanine balconies. A guard crosses the hallway midway through the sequence as the camera approaches the large wooden doors at the far end marked with a PRIVATE sign.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the welcoming entrance of a grand historic building into its more restrictive and imposing inner sanctums. It begins by passing through ornate iron gates and across marble floors, moving past a guarded reception desk before ascending a red-carpeted marble staircase. As the camera reaches the upper floor, the scene shifts through wooden double doors into a sunlit corridor and a secondary reception area, eventually approaching a black cage elevator. The perspective then transitions from the bright, open halls into a narrower, artificially lit service stairwell with plain walls and a red banner. Finally, the camera emerges into an impressive grand hallway lined with bronze wolf statues and elaborate chandeliers, passing a guard while moving toward a set of wooden doors marked private.
